query:
Please create a gh issue for this error in our log: 2026-03-23T13:01:49.593549Z  INFO unimatrix_server::background: maintenance tick complete
PANIC at crates/unimatrix-server/src/infra/contradiction.rs:254:5: there is no reactor running, must be called from the context of a Tokio 1.x runtime
2026-03-23T13:01:49.635283Z ERROR unimatrix_server::background: contradiction scan rayon task cancelled; cache retained error=rayon worker cancelled (panic or pool shutdown) tick=92
2026-03-23T13:01:49.640248Z  INFO unimatrix_server::background: extraction tick complete
2026-03-23T13:01:49.640479Z  INFO unimatrix_server::background: background tick complete duration_secs=0.  Then begin a bugfix for that issue in a worktree, since there is active development going on right now.

entries.title: Rayon worker threads have no Tokio runtime — never call Handle::current() inside a rayon closure
Bug fix verification: tokio runtime nesting panic in async tool handler
Rayon panic_handler required to prevent SIGABRT in test harness
Background Task Panic Supervisor: Two-Level tokio::spawn with is_cancelled() Guard
